properties.name: spring.thymeleaf.cache
properties.description: Whether Thymeleaf template caching is enabled.

properties.name: lucy.import-docx.path
properties.description: Folder path that contains DOCX files for content import.

properties.name: lucy.import-docx.auto-run
properties.description: Whether DOCX files should be scanned and imported when the Spring Boot application starts.
